clinical_blockers: No exact UAE poor-feeding workflow source was identified in the reasonable authoritative search.
Acute fever, vomiting, respiratory, dehydration, urine-output, and lethargy concerns are not covered by the selected faltering-growth sections.
The source is England-specific and not directly validated for UAE practice.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
